hero_badge: Over 1,400 families under our direct care
hero_desc: We are not just a mediator; we are your extended family in Gaza. We directly connect benefactors' hearts with those in need under our full supervision, ensuring your giving reaches the deserving with absolute privacy and pride.
footer_desc: Al-Sanabel Foundation for Youth and Development - We believe that giving is a bridge that builds hope, aiming to empower orphans and needy families in Gaza with dignity and fairness.
index_how_it_works_subtitle: A unique system connecting you directly with those in need through strict supervision.
index_step_1_desc: Browse cases carefully vetted through field research by our specialized team.
index_step_2_desc: Once your request is accepted, you can chat directly with the family via our secure system.
index_step_3_desc: Upload your transfer receipt, and we will verify it once the family confirms receipt.
index_feature_1_desc: You speak with the family directly and know exactly where your money goes.
index_feature_2_desc: Every case undergoes a field visit, photography, and verification of official documents.
index_feature_3_desc: Our team monitors all chats and transactions to ensure the safety of both parties.
index_vision_desc: We believe direct connection strengthens bonds of love, but family dignity is a red line we never cross.
about_hero_badge: A story of giving spanning years
about_hero_desc: We are not just a foundation; we are a modern vision combining traditional solidarity with technological power to ensure a dignified life for our people in Gaza.
about_story_title: Human Empowerment.. A Mission and Commitment
about_story_p1: Al-Sanabel Foundation for Youth and Development was established to be a leading platform in organizing charitable work, inspired by traditional Arab social solidarity values. We believe that donation is not just a financial amount, but a message of love and loyalty upon which bridges are built.
about_story_p2: At 'Jussur Sanabel', we connect donors directly with targeted families under our direct supervision to ensure full peace of mind for the donor and maintain the privacy and dignity of the beneficiary, using the latest field follow-up and documentation systems.
about_vision_desc: We aim to be the first global model in 'Direct Giving', where barriers between the benefactor and the needy disappear while maintaining the highest values of dignity and privacy.
about_mission_desc: Building reliable technical and field bridges that enable orphans and needy families to access the resources necessary for a dignified life by connecting them with a global community of conscious donors.
about_values_title: The Principles That Move Our Giving
about_value_1_desc: We consider your donation a trust on our shoulders, for which we are accountable before God and people.
about_value_2_desc: Field documentation and periodic reports that always put you at the heart of the action.
about_value_3_desc: Preserving the dignity of the beneficiary first and foremost in all stages of support.
about_value_4_desc: Harnessing technical solutions to facilitate giving and monitor impact moment by moment.
about_cta_title: Be Part of the Next Success Story
about_cta_desc: Whether you are a donor or a volunteer, your contribution is the cornerstone upon which we build bridges of hope.
contact_hero_badge: We are not just a platform, we are one family
contact_hero_desc: Our field and administrative team is always available to answer your questions. Whether you are about to donate or need support, we are here to listen.
contact_channels_desc: We pride ourselves on being one of the most responsive and fast-communicating organizations. You can reach us through the following means:
contact_whatsapp_desc: Fastest way to get an immediate response
contact_form_desc: Leave your inquiry and a team member will respond in less than 24 hours.
contact_form_message_placeholder: Write your inquiry details here clearly...
contact_map_title: Our Services Cover All Areas of the Strip
contact_map_desc: We are present in the field in all governorates to ensure maximum access and transparency.
transparency_hero_badge: Your donation is a trust we take pride in fulfilling
transparency_hero_desc: At Jussur Sanabel, we believe transparency is not just reports, but a commitment we make to every donor who placed their trust in us, ensuring every cent reaches those in need with honesty and integrity.
transparency_journey_title: How Do We Ensure Your Giving Reaches?
transparency_journey_desc: A strict supervisory system from the moment of transfer to the moment of documented receipt.
transparency_step_1_desc: Each case is inspected in the field by our specialized team and all official documents are documented before publishing.
transparency_step_2_desc: All communication and agreement processes are conducted under management supervision to ensure donor safety and case privacy.
transparency_step_3_desc: The receipt is uploaded by the family, and the case is not closed until the full arrival of the amount is confirmed.
transparency_report_1_desc: Full summary of all revenues and expenses during 2025, certified by an internal auditor.
transparency_report_2_desc: Distribution of aid and how your donations contribute to changing the reality of needy families in the field.
transparency_report_3_desc: Periodic certificate from independent legal accounting offices to ensure the neutrality of financial reports.
transparency_trust_desc: We don't just provide reports; we allow donors (under certain conditions) to directly communicate with cases under our supervision, to see for themselves where their money goes. This is the highest level of transparency.
transparency_trust_policy: All your donations are protected by a strict privacy policy.
transparency_faq_desc: The Integrity and Compliance team is available to respond to any complaint or question regarding financial data.
cases_hero_desc: We document hope and bring distances closer. Browse human cases documented in the field and be a reason to change a person's life today.
cases_empty_desc: Please come back later or check other sections. We are constantly working on documenting new cases.
case_details_docs_disclaimer: * Documents have been blurred for privacy and have been fully reviewed by the Verification Committee.
case_details_updates_empty: Implementation updates and field visits will be added here sequentially.
case_details_cta_desc: With your contribution, you create a new reality for this family.
case_details_impact_food: Complete food basket for a month
case_details_satisfied_desc: Thank you to everyone who contributed. By the grace of God and your help, the needs of this family have been secured.
case_details_chat_pending_title: Communication request with this case is under review
case_details_chat_pending_desc: You will be notified as soon as the supervisor approves your request to communicate with the case.
case_details_chat_rejected: Request to communicate with this case was rejected by management.
case_details_chat_request: Request to communicate with this case
case_details_follow_desc: You will receive notifications when new updates are added to this case.
case_details_teams_empty: No support teams for this project currently. Be the first to initiate!
case_details_admin_disclaimer: This action is immediately recorded in the operations log.
case_details_trust_disclaimer: As an official entity, we ensure your contribution reaches the concerned persons in full.
case_details_modal_desc: Create a special link for your team (friends, colleagues, followers) and compete in doing good.
case_details_modal_placeholder_prompt: Why should others join your team?
register_case_desc: Please provide us with details accurately so we can review the request and send the field survey team as soon as possible.
register_case_type_label: Choose the case type to customize data
register_case_placeholder_title: Example: Orphan sponsorship for the family of the martyr...
register_case_placeholder_desc: Write a quick summary of the family or orphan's situation and the main need...
register_case_placeholder_story: Details of living conditions and basic needs are listed here accurately and objectively...
register_case_label_orphan_count: Number of orphans in the request
admin_dashboard_welcome_desc: .. here is a summary of current activity on Jussur platform.
admin_dashboard_empty_impact_proofs: All impact proofs have been reviewed
admin_users_manager_desc: Manage the administrative team and define system access levels.
admin_all_users_desc: Full view and control over all registered accounts (donors, beneficiaries, team).
admin_mod_action_soft_delete: Soft delete (Prevent entry with possibility of reversal)
admin_all_users_mod_super_admin_notice: Radical actions (like permanent deletion) require Super Admin approval
admin_all_users_btn_escalate: Escalate exceptional request to Super Admin
admin_escalation_modal_desc: The request will reach the Super Admin immedaitely for review and decision.
admin_escalation_placeholder_reason: Explain in detail why you think it's necessary to implement this exceptional procedure...
admin_mod_js_confirm: Final Warning: Are you sure you want to execute ({action}) on this user?
admin_mod_js_warning_hard_delete: Warning: All data related to this account will be permanently deleted!
admin_cases_manager_desc: Follow up, review, and document humanitarian cases registered in the system.
admin_cases_manager_empty: No cases within this category currently.
admin_cases_manager_update_placeholder_t: Example: New field visit, health status update
admin_pending_approvals_desc: List of users who registered as beneficiaries awaiting account activation
admin_pending_approvals_empty: No activation requests currently. Everything is under control!
admin_pending_approvals_js_confirm_appro: Are you sure you want to activate this account? The user will be able to post cases immediately.
admin_pending_approvals_js_success_text: Account activated successfully and notification sent to user.
admin_pending_approvals_js_reject_label: Please write rejection reason to be shown to the user
admin_pending_approvals_js_reject_placeh: Incomplete data / ID photo not clear...
admin_pending_approvals_js_reject_succes: Account suspended and user informed of the reason.
admin_chat_monitor_placeholder_title: Select a conversation from the list to start monitoring
admin_chat_monitor_placeholder_desc: You can view messages and take administrative actions when needed
admin_chat_monitor_modal_placeholder_not: Write details of the action taken here...
admin_chat_monitor_no_messages: No messages in this conversation yet
admin_chat_monitor_js_ban_warning: User account will be suspended immediately!
admin_chat_requests_desc: Monitor and organize conversations between donors and needy families.
admin_activity_logs_desc: Full historical record of all changes made by the staff team.
admin_analytics_desc: Comprehensive analysis of all performance and growth indicators in the Jussur Sanabel platform
admin_analytics_fees_note: * Fees are deducted to cover operating expenses and ensure sustainability.
admin_dist_desc: Manage bank reconciliation and payouts to families.
admin_dist_bank_confirm_desc: Verified receipts waiting for bank confirmation.
admin_dist_payout_desc: Total confirmed funds waiting to be sent to cases.
admin_dist_payout_notes_placeholder: Add administrative notes for this payout...
msg_payout_success: Payout generated and case log updated automatically.
admin_settings_desc: Unified management of platform standards and financial percentages.
admin_settings_fee_desc: This percentage is added to every donation for the foundation and shown to the donor before payment.
admin_settings_fee_info: The donation amount will be multiplied by this percentage and added as an additional operating fee.
admin_settings_needs_desc: Available options for selecting needs when registering a new case.
admin_settings_needs_info: Separate each need with a comma (,). These options will appear as checkboxes when registering a new case.
admin_settings_chat_day_desc: Determine the single weekday when donors are allowed to send messages to cases.
admin_settings_chat_day_info: Outside of this day, no donor can send messages to cases. Donors can set their own time window.
admin_escalations_super_desc: Review and document all requests submitted by administrators for exceptional privileges.
admin_escalations_admin_desc: Follow up on your requests submitted to Senior Administration (Super Admin).
admin_escalations_no_requests: There are no emergency requests at the moment.
admin_escalations_auto_reply: No additional comments. Action taken automatically.
admin_escalations_reply_placeholder: Write reasons for rejection or a confirmation message for the administrator...
admin_escalations_js_confirm: Confirmation: Executing this decision is radical and cannot be undone. Are you sure?
admin_oversight_comms_desc: This screen displays all private and confidential correspondence made by the user within the platform. They are grouped by the other person in the conversation.
admin_oversight_select_contact: Choose a contact from the list to view the conversation
admin_oversight_mod_panel_title: Moderation and Monitoring Panel for Current Chat
admin_oversight_opt_ban_specific: Ban communication with other party only
admin_oversight_opt_soft_delete: Soft Delete (Prevent login with possibility of reversal)
admin_oversight_opt_undo_ban_specific: Lift Communication Ban with this Party
admin_oversight_reason_placeholder: Write details of the action taken here...
admin_oversight_escalation_info: Radical actions (like final deletion) require Super Admin approval
admin_oversight_escalation_btn: Submit Exceptional Request to Super Admin
admin_oversight_escalation_desc: The request will reach the Super Admin balance immediately for review and decision.
admin_oversight_escalation_placeholder: Explain in detail why you see the need to execute this exceptional action...
admin_oversight_js_hard_delete_confirm: Are you absolutely sure about the hard delete of this account? This step cannot be reversed.
admin_fees_desc: Complete report of all amounts deducted as operation fees for the platform.
admin_fees_no_data: No donations subject to operation fees yet.
admin_impact_desc: Review and document aid delivery via photos and documents.
admin_impact_no_pending: No pending impact proof requests at the moment.
admin_impact_rejection_placeholder: Rejection reason (will be sent to beneficiary)...
admin_impact_no_pending_desc: All submissions have been processed. Monitor periodically for new notifications.
notif_case_activated_msg: Your data has been reviewed successfully. You can now start posting cases and receiving support.
flash_no_delete_super: Super Admin account cannot be deleted
flash_user_deleted: Staff access revoked and user deleted successfully
notif_escalation_title: New Emergency Request from Admin Panel
notif_escalation_msg: Admin {name} has raised a new request type ({type}). Please review.
flash_escalation_success: Request successfully raised to Super Admin. You will receive a notification upon response.
flash_escalation_error: Error occurred while raising the request
flash_request_already_resolved: This request has already been addressed
log_escalation_approved_hard_delete: Request approved and user hard-delete executed successfully.
log_escalation_rejected: Request rejected for the following reason: {reply}
notif_escalation_resolved_msg: Super Admin responded to your request ({type}): {reply}
flash_request_resolve_error: Error occurred while processing request resolution
flash_case_satisfied: Sorry, this case has reached its donation goal. Thank you for your generosity.
flash_case_sponsored: Sorry, this case is already sponsored for this month. You can contribute a direct donation.
flash_case_satisfied_short: This case has reached its donation goal.
flash_case_sponsored_short: This case is already sponsored for this month.
flash_donation_done: Thank you! Your donation was completed successfully and reached the beneficiary.
flash_donation_process_error: An error occurred while processing the donation
error_chat_window_times: Please specify both start and end times.
error_chat_window_order: Start time must be before end time.
notif_chat_window_title: Donor {name} has set a chat window
notif_chat_window_msg: Donor {name} will be available to communicate with you on {day} from {from} to {to}.
flash_chat_window_saved: Chat window ({from} - {to}) saved and all relevant families notified.
notif_chat_day_updated_msg: The platform's official chat day has been updated to {day}. Messaging will only be open on that day within the donor's set time window.
flash_settings_updated: System settings updated and users notified successfully.
flash_settings_error: An error occurred while updating settings
flash_unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action
flash_unauthorized_action: You are not authorized to perform this action
flash_unauthorized_invoice: You are not authorized to view this invoice
flash_donors_only: Sorry, this section is for donors only.
flash_update_success_home: Your update has been submitted successfully and will appear on the homepage soon.
flash_update_error: An error occurred while saving the update.
flash_proof_success: Impact proof uploaded successfully. It will appear to donors once approved by management.
flash_upload_error: An error occurred while uploading data
flash_activate_first: Sorry, you must activate your account first to be able to add cases.
flash_case_registered: Case registration request submitted successfully. it will be reviewed by management.
flash_case_register_error: An error occurred while registering the case: {error}
flash_id_required: ID number and address are required for beneficiaries
flash_login_disabled_maintenance: We apologize, login attempts have been temporarily disabled to protect the system. Please try again in an hour.
flash_account_suspended: Dear user, your account has been suspended by management for the following reason: {reason}
log_case_team_created: New volunteer team created: {name} for case: {id}
flash_team_name_taken: This name is already taken for this project
flash_team_created: Your team has been created successfully!
log_testimonial_update: Updated his "What they say about us" testimonial
log_proof_impact_submit: Submitted new impact proof pending review: {title}
notif_donor_waiting_msg: The donor has agreed to the communication terms and is waiting for your approval to start the chat.
error_account_banned_global: Your account is banned from communicating with users by administrative decision.
error_account_banned_support_only: Sorry, your account is banned from communicating with users. You can only message technical support.
error_user_banned_global: Sorry, communication with this user is currently not allowed by administrative decision.
error_comm_consent_required: Both parties must agree to monitoring terms before starting
error_chat_request_banned: Sorry, your account is banned from new communication requests.
error_comm_not_allowed_guardian: Communication request with this user is not allowed by administrative decision.
msg_already_approved: You already have an approved conversation with this family. You can continue in the messages section.
msg_already_requested: You have already sent a communication request to this family, pending admin approval.
log_chat_request_created: Communication request with case family: {title} (Family-level contact)
msg_request_sent_success: Communication request sent to supervisor. A single chat for all family needs will be opened upon approval.
log_chat_request_handled: Chat request status updated to {status}. Notes: {comment}
admin_dist_revert_warning: Are you sure? This will un-confirm all transactions in this batch.
admin_dist_revert_payout_warning: Amounts will be returned to pending distribution and a note added to case history.
admin_payout_footer: This voucher was automatically generated by the Jussur Sanabel distribution system.
admin_dist_select_method_error: Please select a payout method first
admin_dist_payout_history_desc: Complete record of all payout vouchers issued to cases.
admin_dist_history_desc: Records of all matched and accepted bank transfers in the system
admin_dist_batch_details_desc: List of all donations and parties included in the specified bank reconciliation batch
admin_dist_no_selection_error: Please select at least one transaction to reconcile
admin_dist_actual_amount_error: Please enter the actual amount received in the bank
register_financial_one_required: At least one payment method is required (IBAN, PalPay, or Jawwal Pay)
register_phone_length_error: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits
register_id_length_error: ID number must be exactly 9 digits
flash_id_registered: This ID number is already registered in the system
father_deceased_error: An orphan sponsorship request cannot be submitted if the father is alive.
